/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TemperStub.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TemperStub.dir/TemperStub_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TemperStub.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TemperStub.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TemperStub.dir/src/dbmanager.cpp.o -o TemperStub  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
